texts: Removed the announcement about the database maintenance.
Added the user's review (if any) to the top of the review list so that it's always visible.
Fixed a bug that stopped the existing review text from appearing in the text box when editing reviews.
Changed the intro text and descriptions on most pages.
Added a tracking feature to the Universal Gifts page.
Fixed a calculation bug in the Dispense and Training Calculator that accidentally doubled crate rewards from MDs with bonuses.
Dramatically shortened the footer, moved the content to the About page.
